title: Better Performance
description: This Modpack adds many mods that improve your performance, it also adds a few Quality of Life mods.
body:
This Modpack adds mods such as Sodium wich will greatly improve the performance of your game. No more playing with 12 render distance, even potato pc's can now run with 20 render distance.
There are also a few Quality of Life mods included that make Minecraft generally more comfortable.
And the best part of this Modpack is: its client sided, so you can also play on server with this.

Note: Even though the Modpack is client-sided and you could play with it on servers, that doesn't mean   you are allowed with this Modpack on server's. Keep in mind, that playing with mods on server's is   generally a pretty sensitive topic.
